Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. The street in the source
is empty — populate it with the people and vehicles specified below. Remove all
modern businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, street-facing, fov 75
- commercial arterial road, 4-lane, asphalt
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: north driveway apron, south driveway apron; parking: open asphalt apron surrounding pump islands
- gas station canopy building at center lot over pump islands, 1 story, steel frame, corrugated metal fascia, flat roof, 30 feet from road setback
- service station office building at rear right corner, 1 story, concrete block, brick veneer, flat parapet roof, at parking apron setback
- open service bay building at rear left corner, 1 story, concrete block, gabled metal roof, at parking apron setback
- utilities: overhead power lines on wooden poles, transformer on northeast corner pole
- landscape: flat asphalt apron, painted concrete curbing, narrow grass strip at road edge
- immutable elements: canopy with four corner support posts, pump island with eight dispensers, north and south driveway aprons
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2025
Post-pandemic era. A 2025 fuel stop — LED canopy, full-color digital price sign, and a convenience store selling fresh food.

CONDITION: thriving — well-maintained, freshly painted, active business, clean lot

PERIOD DETAILS
- large convenience stores with fresh food
- drive-through coffee lane attached to the store
- price sign showing gas around $3.40
- main sign: "Marathon" branded gas station — Marathon pole sign with price display and Marathon colors on the canopy fascia
- window signs: 'SCAN & GO — SKIP THE LINE', 'MEMBERS SAVE 10¢/GAL'
- QR-code stickers on the pump screens
- digital menu screens glowing in the store windows
Typography: minimalist geometric sans-serif, heavily simplified flat logos.
Sign text is only what appears in quotes — do not turn other words from this prompt into signage.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 6 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a delivery van driver walking out with a coffee
- a clerk restocking the grab-and-go cooler behind the glass
- a delivery courier with a large insulated backpack
Clothing: men in oversized fit tees, wide-leg pants; women in chunky dad sneakers, high-waisted wide-leg jeans. Fashion palette: sage green, beige, cream. No posing or eye contact. All people on sidewalks, at storefronts, or beside parked vehicles — the driving lanes stay empty of pedestrians. Any customer activity at the pumps happens next to a parked vehicle — no one refuels without a car present.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 4 period vehicles, all different:
- 2017-2025 Honda CR-V — rounded best-selling crossover — blue
- 2021-2025 Kia Telluride — boxy upscale three-row SUV — black
- 2021-2025 Jeep Grand Cherokee — upscale chrome-accent SUV — white
- 2021-2025 Chrysler Pacifica — sleek minivan, thin lights — gray
Parked with gaps; no vehicle newer than 2025.
All vehicles obey normal US right-hand traffic flow — parked parallel to the curb, each facing the same direction as its adjacent lane. Nothing sideways, diagonal, or against traffic.
One of these vehicles is parked at the pump island with its driver standing beside it refueling.
PLACEMENT: the first one parked on the LEFT side near the corner; the rest parked on the RIGHT side. No vehicle in the same spot as any other era.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, high-visibility crosswalks
- utilities: overhead lines in older areas, underground in new developments, fiber optic widespread

TREES
- cottonwood tree at northeast corner of lot: maturing tree
- elm tree at sidewalk edge left of entrance: young tree, thin trunk
- cedar tree at back fence line: mature tree, large canopy
Tree sizes MUST follow this specification even where they differ from the source photo.

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — digital — smartphone or mirrorless camera look.
Color: high saturation. Grain: very clean, minimal to no noise.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 2021-2025 Kia Telluride — boxy upscale three-row SUV
2021-2025 Jeep Grand Cherokee — upscale chrome-accent SUV
2021-2025 Chrysler Pacifica — sleek minivan, thin lights
